channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Atlanta Braves Hall of Fame manager Bobby Cox has died at 84
item.description: Cox managed Braves' teams that ruled National League and won 1995 World Series.

item.title: Hantavirus live updates: Spanish authorities preparing for M/V Hondius arrival
item.description: The M/V Hondius cruise ship, on which the hantavirus infection was identified, is making its way to the Canary Islands.

item.title: Pedestrian fatally struck by Frontier plane departing Denver for LA
item.description: A pedestrian was hit by a Frontier airplane departing Denver for LA late Friday night, the airport and airline confirmed.

item.title: Putin says Russia fighting for "just cause" in Ukraine during Victory Day parade
item.description: The Victory Day celebrations didn't include a show of heavy weapons for the first time in nearly two decades.
